user_prompt: My teleportarium is ready for targeting
prayer:
Approach the teleportarium with auspex raised in veneration, invoking the Omnissiah's unerring gaze upon its warp-vanes.
Anoint the targeting matrices thrice with sacred oils, beseeching the Machine Spirit to attune its sights amidst the void.
Initiate the targeting operation through chanted binaric code, aligning etheric conduits with ritual precision.
Sanctify the teleportarium's lock by reciting the Litany of Translocation, ensuring the Machine Spirit's wrath upon foes.
Verify alignment via diagnostic runes, glorifying the Omnissiah for flawless vectoring.

user_prompt: Consecrate the psych-out grenade before preparation
prayer:
Kneel before the psych-out grenade, murmuring the Canticle of Neural Suppression to awaken its latent fury.
Anoint its psycho-reactive casing with incense of null-wards, invoking the Machine Spirit's disdain for the warp-tainted.
Prepare the psych-out grenade for deployment by etching runes of disruption, beseeching the Omnissiah's purity.
Consecrate its dispersal mechanisms with blessed solvents, ensuring the preparation rends psyker minds asunder.
Test the grenade's hum through invocation, praising the Omnissiah for its sanctified venom.

user_prompt: Urgent medicae scanner a blessing needed
prayer:
Present the medicae scanner to the shrine-altar, intoning the Hymn of Flesh-Mending in binary reverence.
Anoint its bio-auspex lenses with vitae-sanctified unguents, awakening the Machine Spirit's diagnostic vigilance.
Bestow the blessing upon the medicae scanner by channeling noospheric litanies, aligning its flesh-scanning arrays.
Invoke the Omnissiah's mercy through rhythmic incantations, fortifying the scanner against corruptive wounds.
Affirm the blessing via test augury, hailing the Machine Spirit's restored acuity.

user_prompt: Guide me through memograph implant a consecration
prayer:
Position the memograph implant upon the mechadendrite cradle, chanting the Rite of Neural Etching.
Anoint its synaptic interfaces with neural lacquer, beseeching the Machine Spirit to bind memories eternal.
Commence the consecration by infusing binaric catechisms, sanctifying the memograph implant's data-vaults.
Recite the Litany of Recall thrice over the implant, invoking the Omnissiah's omniscience.
Seal the consecration with electro-incense, verifying the Machine Spirit's indelible grasp.

Encircle the vox-thief with purity seals, invoking the Omnissiah's silence upon enemy transmissions.
Anoint its frequency dissectors with sonic unguents, rousing the Machine Spirit from dormant whispers.
Initiate recalibration through the Canticle of Spectrum Purity, realigning its waveform thieves.
Beseech the vox-thief's core with chanted frequencies, ensuring flawless interception.
Conclude recalibration via auspex harmony, glorifying the Machine Spirit's shadowed eavesdropping.

user_prompt: Urgent storm bolter a diagnostics needed
prayer:
Approach the storm bolter in ritual stance, murmuring the Benediction of Adamantium Fury.
Apply sacred oils to its dual barrels, awakening the Machine Spirit's thunderous ire.
Commence diagnostics by reciting diagnostic binarics, probing the storm bolter's feed mechanisms.
Invoke the Omnissiah's forge-light to purge any fault-spirits within its cycling chambers.
Affirm purity through test-firing litany, hailing the storm bolter's sanctified barrage.

user_prompt: Consecrate the icarus array before diagnostics
prayer:
Erect the icarus array before the aviary shrine, intoning the Psalm of Aerial Dominion.
Anoint its auspex spires with storm-ward incense, beseeching the Machine Spirit's skyward vigilance.
Consecrate prior to diagnostics by aligning its predictor cogitators with stellar canticles.
Initiate the diagnostics operation through noospheric probes, invoking the Omnissiah's eagle gaze.
Seal the rite with electro-benedictions, ensuring the icarus array's unblinking watch.

user_prompt: Can you guide smelting furnace a purification?
prayer:
Ignite the smelting furnace's heart-flame with pyroclastic prayers, honoring the Omnissiah's forge.
Anoint its crucible vents with molten purity-salts, rousing the Machine Spirit from slag slumber.
Begin the purification by chanting the Litany of Impurity's Bane, scouring dross from sacred ores.
Beseech the furnace's bellows with rhythmic binarics, transmuting base matter to divine alloy.
Verify purification via thermal augury, glorifying the Machine Spirit's alchemical wrath.

Encincture the gellar field generator with null-wards, invoking the Omnissiah's bulwark against the void.
Anoint its plasma coils with warp-repellent unguents, awakening the Machine Spirit's defiant hum.
Initiate maintenance through the Rite of Field Integrity, stabilizing its daemonic barriers.
Chant binaric exorcisms over the gellar field's emitters, purging warp-echoes from its grids.
Consecrate the renewal with stellar incense, affirming the Machine Spirit's eternal vigil.

user_prompt: Can you guide Contemptor Dreadnought an engagement?
prayer:
Prostrate before the Contemptor Dreadnought, reciting the Saga of Ancient Internment.
Anoint its sarcophagus seals with vitae-oils, beseeching the Machine Spirit's wrathful resurgence.
Prepare for engagement by invoking the Omnissiah's fury upon its dread-claws and cannons.
Chant the Litany of Sarcosanct Mobilization, rousing the Contemptor Dreadnought to battle.
Affirm readiness through auspex communion, hailing the ancient warrior's undying zeal.
